recentTweets.text: A tremendous honor and a tribute to the incredible work of our district office team. We always put constituent service first.

This legislation would adjust their status to lawful permit resident. It’s the right thing to do for these individuals and their families. It’s the right thing to do for our economy and for https://t.co/iU6svvYj7X

Last week, USA Properties broke ground on The Steven, a 180-home affordable senior apartment community in Rocklin. 
This new complex will provide affordable apartment homes for our seniors, helping address the growing need for affordable housing in Placer County.

It’s official!  Our office has been honored with the 2026 #DemocracyAwards Best of Constituent Service Award from @congressfdn. When we say Congress can work — this is what we mean. Thank you to the Congressional Management Foundation for this recognition.

Good news. Our bill to stop the massive fraud seen at California Community Colleges just passed the House with strong bipartisan support.  

California allowed millions in financial aid from 1.2 million “ghost” students, a third of all applicants. https://t.co/Kl23K8D2mp

I'm not the only one critical of California's absurdly slow vote count. A Washington Post editorial calls it a "national embarrassment." The NY Times compared it to the "pre-telegraph era."  

It's another example of our government struggling to perform basic functions. https://t.co/Dh8mQif0NO

I'm glad Virginia will continue to have fair district lines, just as I've opposed mid-decade gerrymandering in other states. No one is 'winning' the redistricting war. Our democracy is losing. We need independent redistricting and fair representation in every state.

The CCP-linked fugitive who ran the secret Reedley bio lab has been convicted and faces 20 years in prison. The lab contained malaria, HIV, E. coli, and possibly Ebola. 

A similar lab was just found in Vegas. Congress needs to pass our bill to uncover any other CCP-backed labs. https://t.co/i76s8QtnJa

The Redistricting War is about to spin further out of control. It's time for Congress to assure all Americans fair representation by (1) passing my bill to prohibit mid-decade redistricting and (2) having independent commissions for every state. https://t.co/Oejuye0cBi

The CA Legislature voted down Kayleigh's law, which lets survivors of sexual assault get a permanent restraining order against their abuser. This is especially alarming since the CA Parole Board recently released several serial child molesters who were serving life sentences. https://t.co/qpgiHlKc9u

San Francisco middle schools outlawed algebra for a decade in the name of "equity." The result was just the opposite: wider achievement gaps and worse overall student learning. 

Now, incoming students at even selective CA colleges can't do basic math and need remedial courses. https://t.co/xxZKRmKDF3
The cost of the California high-speed rail project is now estimated at $231 billion. Our country has never seen a fiscal disaster of this magnitude.

The Redistricting War has been a national disaster. I will be sponsoring legislation to end partisan gerrymandering by having congressional districts drawn by independent commissions in every state. https://t.co/68gdITTR6i

We need a full assessment of all security vulnerabilities in connection with Saturday's attack and greater congressional oversight into our overall preparedness. We also need to fund Homeland Security immediately and to dial down the rhetoric in political discourse. I joined https://t.co/Zli9Ge0rtV

-181,700 private sector jobs lost in 2025 and 432,900 private jobs lost the last https://t.co/LYLg9wxjUz

I'm grateful for the heroic actions of law enforcement in stopping another act of political violence. We need a full assessment of any vulnerabilities at last night's event. And we should all dial down the rhetoric and aim for greater civility and unity in our political culture.

Jeff is highly respected both by the community and his https://t.co/Yl95SYLv6p

The return of gerrymandering in yet another state marks a further regression for democracy. Voters have made it clear they want fair district lines for elections in all states. It is time for Congress to limit redistricting to once per decade and to end gerrymandering for good.

If you add up all the emissions reduced by California regulations for 16 years, twice that amount was released in just one year with the 2020 fires. The best way to protect air quality is to prevent fires. That’s why I’m supporting a bill to encourage active forest management. https://t.co/5mbtOBTFxI

The new Food Pyramid is one of the most important government documents produced in a long time. By consuming real foods, Americans can live longer and healthier lives. We should ensure that schools and other food assistance programs are guided by these principles. https://t.co/4XUQmDupbD
I am officially introducing the Gas Tax Reduction Act. This will stop states like California from overtaxing their residents. https://t.co/9gYA0wU5UA

The United States does not destroy civilizations. Nor do we threaten to do so as some sort of negotiating tactic. We should all desire a future of freedom, security, and prosperity for the people of Iran.

Congress has a responsibility to conduct oversight with respect to ongoing

Congratulations to @NASA on the launch of Artemis II. A New Space Age is upon us, one that can bring all Americans together, with a sense of humility and awe, as we lead humanity to new heights of exploration and discovery.

The ongoing shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security is a stark example of how hyper-partisanship in Congress is failing the American people. I have voted to fund the Department every chance I've had. I voted for tonight's short-term funding extension in the House and

California has the Number 1 rate of illiteracy in America. For years the state endorsed discredited approaches to literacy. Reading was simply taught incorrectly.

I'm sponsoring the Science of Reading Act to change that. The bill just passed committee with bipartisan support. https://t.co/CagfT0hl8x

CA gas prices are already 50 cents higher than the next closest state. Sacramento politicians are trying to get us to $8/gallon as quickly as possible.

They could suspend the gas tax, reduce cap & trade regulations, or relax fuel blend requirements. They're doing the opposite. https://t.co/T2MUGKDySK

We just passed a bill to stamp out California's massive community college fraud. Over a third of applications in our state, 1.2 million in all, were fakes used for financial aid fraud. The No Aid for Ghost Students Act passed today in an overwhelming bipartisan committee vote. https://t.co/iqRP5kEL3G

California has the highest cost of living in America. Highest gas prices, highest electricity rates, highest taxes, second highest housing costs and water bills.

The way to make America more affordable is to learn from California government's failures. https://t.co/Z5n7A6Q1YB

Californians were charged extra fees on their phone service the last six years for a "Next Generation 911 System." Yet after spending $450 million, Newsom scrapped the whole project because the technology doesn't work.

Now there will be a state and federal investigation. https://t.co/THMGvJ0UAh

It is the longstanding policy of the United States that one of the most evil regimes in history cannot get its hands on the most powerful weapon in history. The decapitation of the Iranian regime and the destruction of its instruments of terror and death hold the potential for a

Good news. The serial child molester granted early release by Newsom's parole board will remain in custody. Our own District Attorney in Placer County immediately filed new charges stemming from a separate 1996 assault on a child in Roseville.

A child molester serving 3 life sentences was just granted parole and Newsom is denying responsibility. But he signed the early release law and it's his parole board letting the man out. 

The "monster parents fear most," as the judge called him, could now be back on our streets. https://t.co/eOWoMgEOCD

At this moment, the price of gas in California is $4.63/gallon. This is by far the highest in the nation. It's 23 cents higher than Hawaii, an island state.  

It's also $1.65 higher than Maryland, a bluer state than California. Our state's energy policies are uniquely harmful. https://t.co/nDcHW8McSm

I asked Attorney General Bondi to focus DOJ's anti-fraud efforts on California, the Fraud Capital of America. I've also requested a GAO audit of all fraud in the state.

We already know about $32 billion in EDD fraud, billions with SNAP/Medi-Cal, and millions in financial aid. https://t.co/YIOovj47OW

After overturning California's gas-car ban, we're now going to cut its excessive gas tax. My bill sets a national cap that will save CA drivers 21 cents/gallon immediately.   

California has a higher gas tax than every state yet has worse roads than just about every state. https://t.co/RcmRMbbeqW
